Privacy Policy for Mobile Applications:Thank you for selectingFind My Device Apps("we", "us", "our"). We prioritize                        customer privacy                        through an ethical performance culture based on trust, simplicity, and confidence. We are                        committed to maintaining the confidentiality of customer information while using our mobile                        applications. We strive to provide “privacy protection” critical in sustaining trust and

delivering better services.Welcome to our Privacy Policy page! This page is designed to inform you about how we collect,                        use, and disclose your personal information when you choose to use Our apps.Kindly review this policy meticulously to understand our policies and practices regarding your                        information and its handling. If you disagree with our policies and practices, please refrain
from downloading, registering, or using this app. By downloading, registering, or using the app,                        you agree to adhere to this privacy policy.

Information Collection and UseFor optimal service experience, we may request certain personally identifiable information. Rest                        assured, any information we request is retained on your device and is not collected by us                        directly.However, please note that our app utilizes third-party services that may collect information to                        identify you. Log Data:Whenever you use our Service and encounter an app error, we collect data and information (via                        third-party products) known as Log Data. This Log Data may include details such as your device's                        IP address, device name, operating system version, app configuration, usage time and date, and                        other statistical information.

Cookies:Our Service does not explicitly use cookies. However, certain third-party code and libraries may                        utilize cookies for data collection to enhance their services. You have the option to accept or                        refuse these cookies, although refusal may limit certain features of the Service.

Service Providers:We may engage third-party companies and individuals for various reasons related to our Service,                        such as facilitating the Service, providing it on our behalf, performing service-related tasks,                        or analyzing usage patterns.

Security:While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your Personal Information,                        please understand that no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is                        entirely secure. Therefore, we cannot guarantee absolute security.

Links to Other Sites;Our Service may contain links to external sites that are not operated by us. We advise you to                        review the privacy policies of these sites, as we have no control over their content, policies,                        or practices.

Children’s Privacy:Our Services are not intended for users under the age of 13. If we discover that a child under                        13 has provided us with personal information, we will promptly delete it from our servers. If                        you believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately.

Changes to This Privacy Policy:We may update our Privacy Policy periodically. We encourage you to review this page regularly                        for any changes. Any updates will be effective immediately upon posting on this page.                        This policy is effective as of 2024-03-18.
